hero.subtext: A focused speaking course designed for Arabic speakers who know some English but struggle to speak confidently. In just one month, you'll gain the confidence to express yourself clearly in everyday conversations.

features.title: What You'll Get
features.subtitle: A practical, speaking-focused course built to help you break through the fear and start communicating naturally.

items.title: Speaking Practice
items.desc: Practice real English conversations in every session. Focus on everyday topics so you feel ready for real-life situations.

items.title: Confidence Building
items.desc: Overcome the fear of speaking. Through guided exercises and a supportive environment, you'll gain the confidence to express yourself.

items.title: Recorded Sessions
items.desc: All sessions are recorded and available to you. Rewatch anytime to review what you learned and practice at your own pace.

items.title: WhatsApp Support
items.desc: Join a student WhatsApp group and get individual support directly from the instructor. Ask questions and receive guidance anytime.

items.title: Real Conversations
items.desc: No boring textbook drills. Learn through real conversation practice, role-plays, and interactive speaking activities.

items.title: Direct Instructor Guidance
items.desc: Get personal feedback and one-on-one guidance from Coach Ahmed throughout the course to improve your speaking skills faster.

howItWorks.title: Get Started in 3 Simple Steps
howItWorks.subtitle: Joining the course is simple. Here's how to get started and begin improving your English speaking skills.

steps.title: Enroll via WhatsApp
steps.desc: Send us a message on WhatsApp to register. You'll receive all the course details and your session schedule.

steps.title: Join Live Sessions
steps.desc: Attend 2 online sessions per week. Practice speaking, ask questions, and get feedback in a supportive group setting.

steps.title: Speak with Confidence
steps.desc: By the end of the month, you'll express your ideas more clearly and participate in everyday conversations comfortably.

testimonials.title: What Students Are Saying
testimonials.subtitle: Hear from students who joined our speaking practice sessions and started gaining confidence.

items.name: Mona Tarek
items.text: I always knew grammar but could never speak. After a few sessions, I started forming sentences without overthinking. The practice environment made all the difference.

items.name: Youssef Kamal
items.text: The instructor makes you feel comfortable even when you make mistakes. I started speaking more confidently at work meetings after just two weeks.

items.name: Hana Mostafa
items.text: I was afraid to speak in front of others. The small group sessions and WhatsApp support helped me overcome that fear. I feel much more confident now.

pricing.title: Simple & Affordable
pricing.subtitle: One clear price. Everything you need to start speaking English confidently.
pricing.note: Contact us on WhatsApp to reserve your spot

finalCta.title: Ready to Start Speaking English?
finalCta.subtitle: Don't let fear hold you back. Join the course, practice with real conversations, and speak with confidence in just one month.
finalCta.note: Message us on WhatsApp to get started

footer.tagline: Helping Arabic speakers break through the fear of speaking English — with practice, support, and confidence.
